diffs.diff:
--- a/explore_data.py
+++ b/explore_data.py
@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+import torch

+import os

+

+data_dir = os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR', '/data')

+train = torch.load(os.path.join(data_dir, 'train.pt'))

+val = torch.load(os.path.join(data_dir, 'val.pt'))

+

+print('=== TRAIN ===')

+for k, v in train.items():

+    if isinstance(v, torch.Tensor):

+        print(f'{k}: shape={v.shape}, dtype={v.dtype}')

+    else:

+        print(f'{k}: {v}')

+

+print('\n=== VAL ===')

+for k, v in val.items():

+    if isinstance(v, torch.Tensor):

+        print(f'{k}: shape={v.shape}, dtype={v.dtype}')

+    else:

+        print(f'{k}: {v}')

+

+print(f'\nnum_skills: {train["num_skills"]}')

+print(f'lengths stats: min={train["lengths"].min()}, max={train["lengths"].max()}, mean={train["lengths"].float().mean():.1f}, median={train["lengths"].float().median():.1f}')

+print(f'corrects mean: {train["corrects"].float().mean():.4f}')

+print(f'skill_ids range: {train["skill_ids"].min()}-{train["skill_ids"].max()}')

+

+# Count total valid prediction steps

+lengths = train['lengths']

+T = train['corrects'].shape[1]

+mask = torch.arange(T - 1).unsqueeze(0) < (lengths.unsqueeze(1) - 1)

+print(f'Total train prediction steps: {mask.sum().item()}')

+

+val_lengths = val['lengths']

+T_val = val['corrects'].shape[1]

+val_mask = torch.arange(T_val - 1).unsqueeze(0) < (val_lengths.unsqueeze(1) - 1)

+print(f'Total val prediction steps: {val_mask.sum().item()}')
